context_bridge-pile-state-promoted:
Pile that is being promoted from SYNCHRONIZED
to PRIMARY. It stays in this state during the graceful
switchover. After completion, YDB will automatically
set it to PRIMARY.
context_bridge-pile-state-synchronised:
Secondary pile where all storage groups are fully
synchronized with PRIMARY. In normal operation,
the pair works as PRIMARY + SYNCHRONISED.
context_bridge-pile-state-not-synchronis:
Storage groups of this pile are not yet fully synchronized
with PRIMARY. After synchronization is complete, YDB
will automatically transition the pile to SYNCHRONIZED.
context_bridge-pile-state-suspended:
Pile is being gracefully transitioned to DISCONNECTED
state. It remains in this state during the graceful shutdown.
After completion, YDB will automatically move it
to DISCONNECTED.
context_bridge-pile-state-disconnected:
Pile is disconnected from PRIMARY and does
not participate in operation execution.
context_cpu-description: CPU load is calculated as the cumulative usage across all actor system pools on all nodes in the cluster
context_memory-description: Memory usage is the total memory consumed by all nodes in the cluster
context_storage-by-type-description: Storage usage is a usage of raw disk space of this media type
context_storage-total-description: Storage usage is a cumulative usage of raw disk space of all media types
context_network-description: Network usage is the average outgoing bandwidth usage across all nodes in the cluster
